title: lepidaploa canescens var. canescens
intro: Lepidaploa canescens var. canescens, also known as the hairy beard grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Lepidaploa canescens var. canescens has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Lepidaploa canescens var. canescens is often used as an infusion or decoction, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
